train_pairs.target: Booze is making the man that is always being blamed tired.

train_pairs.source: balan yabu bimaban…üal…≥aymu…≥a ba…≥gul ya…Ωa…≥gu guli…≥gu …≥un…üa…≤u.
train_pairs.target: The strong man is blaming the mother that is always following death adders.
Sugar is making the healthy mother-in-law fat.

train_pairs.source: bala yila wura ba…≥gul bargandu bi…≥gundu guni…≤u.
train_pairs.target: The tired wallaby is searching for the little feather.
The smoke is making the scorpion tired.
The offended father is carrying the booze.

train_pairs.source: bayi midin ba…≥gun bima…≥gu malayigaraguninaymu…≥agu ban…üan.
train_pairs.target: The death adder that is always searching for scorpions is following the possum.
Booze is making the tired doctor fall asleep.
The lizard is following the smoke.
The dragonfly is searching for the stinging tree.
The mother that is always being ignored is carrying the sugar.
The fat doctor is pushing the big stone.

train_pairs.source: bala garan ba…≥gun waymindu dibanbilmbal…≥aymu…≥agu bu…Ωan.
train_pairs.target: The mother-in-law that is always pushing stones is looking at the smoke.

train_pairs.source: balan baNgay wa…Ωu baNgun bundi…≤…üu …üagi…≤…üu guni…≤u.
train_pairs.target: The big grasshopper is searching for the bent spear.

train_pairs.source: bayi bi…≤…üiri…≤ bi…≥gun ba…≥gul …≤al…≥ga…≥gu mugurugu bu…Ωan.
train_pairs.target: The quiet boy is looking at the tired lizard.

train_pairs.source: bayi …≥uma guli ba…≥gul ya…Ωa…≥gu ban…üalmu…≥agu munduman.
train_pairs.target: The man that is always being followed is offending the strong father.

test_pairs.target: The father that is always being searched for is healing the girl.

test_pairs.source: bala diban bilmbalmu…≥a ba…≥gun bi…≤…üiri…≤…üu guni…≤u.
test_pairs.target: The lizard is searching for the stone that is always being pushed.

test_pairs.source: bayi bargan ba…≥gul ya…Ωa…≥gu gubimbulu…≥un…üanaymu…≥agu ban…üan.
test_pairs.target: The man that is always blaming doctors is following the wallaby

notes:
Original context:
Here are some sentences in the central dialect of Dyirbal as well as their English translations:

1. bayi ya…Ωa …≥un…üaymu…≥a ba…≥gu gurugugu bi…≥gunman. | Booze is making the man that is always being blamed tired.
2. balan yabu bimaban…üal…≥aymu…≥a ba…≥gul ya…Ωa…≥gu guli…≥gu …≥un…üa…≤u. | The strong man is blaming the mother that is always following death adders.
3. balan waymin bambun ba…≥gu …üuga…≥gu …üamiman. | Sugar is making the healthy mother-in-law fat.
4. bala yila wura ba…≥gul bargandu bi…≥gundu guni…≤u. | The tired wallaby is searching for the little feather.
5. balan malayigara ba…≥gu garandu bi…≥gunman. | The smoke is making the scorpion tired.
6. bala gurugu ba…≥gul …≥uma…≥gu mundu…≥gu dimba…≤u. | The offended father is carrying the booze.
7. bayi midin ba…≥gun bima…≥gu malayigaraguninaymu…≥agu ban…üan. | The death adder that is always searching for scorpions is following the possum.
8. bayi gubimbulu bi…≥gun ba…≥gu gurugugu …üagunman. | Booze is making the tired doctor fall asleep.
9. bala garan ba…≥gul bi…≤…üiri…≤…üu ban…üan. | The lizard is following the smoke.
10. balan du…≥an ba…≥gul yiri…≤…üilagu guni…≤u. | The dragonfly is searching for the stinging tree.
11. bala …üuga ba…≥gun yabu…≥gu …≥a…üilmu…≥agu dimba…≤u. | The mother that is always being ignored is carrying the sugar.
12. bala diban …üagi…≤ ba…≥gul gubimbulugu …üami…≥gu bilmban. | The fat doctor is pushing the big stone.
13. bala garan ba…≥gun waymindu dibanbilmbal…≥aymu…≥agu bu…Ωan. | The mother-in-law that is always pushing stones is looking at the smoke.
14. balan baNgay wa…Ωu baNgun bundi…≤…üu …üagi…≤…üu guni…≤u. | The big grasshopper is searching for the bent spear.
15. bayi bi…≤…üiri…≤ bi…≥gun ba…≥gul …≤al…≥ga…≥gu mugurugu bu…Ωan. | The quiet boy is looking at the tired lizard.
16. bayi …≥uma guli ba…≥gul ya…Ωa…≥gu ban…üalmu…≥agu munduman. | The man that is always being followed is offending the strong father.
